name: ticketing.io
description: * **Architecture:**     * [x] **Auth Service (Port 4000):** Handles Users, JWTs, and Cookies.     * [x] **Tickets Service (Port 5000):** Handles Ticket creation/fetching.     * [x] **Frontend (Port 3000):** Next.js App Router for UI. * **Security & Identity:**     * [x] **Shared Identity:** Ticket Service can read Auth Cookies to identify users.     * [x] **Route Protection:** `requireAuth` middleware blocks non-logged-in users. * **Data Flow:**     * [x] **Create Ticket:** Frontend -> Ticket Service (Authenticated).     * [x] **Read Tickets:** Frontend -> Ticket Service (Public).
